small_potion.name: Small Potion
small_potion.description: A small vial of red liquid. Restores 10 HP.

potion.name: Potion
potion.description: A vial of red liquid. Restores 25 HP.

large_potion.name: Large Potion
large_potion.description: A large flask of red liquid. Restores 50 HP.

strength_tonic.name: Strength Tonic
strength_tonic.description: A fizzing red tonic. +3 Attack for 3 combat rounds.

iron_shield.name: Iron Shield
iron_shield.description: A battered iron shield. Provides +3 defense.

steel_shield.name: Steel Shield
steel_shield.description: A sturdy steel shield. Provides +6 defense.

rusty_key.name: Rusty Key
rusty_key.description: An old iron key. It might open something in the manor.

dark_crown.name: Dark Crown
dark_crown.description: A crown of black iron that whispers when you hold it.

ancient_map.name: Ancient Map
ancient_map.description: A faded map showing passages no one remembers.

red_mushroom.name: Red Mushroom
red_mushroom.description: A bright red mushroom. Smells... interesting.

grey_mushroom.name: Grey Mushroom
grey_mushroom.description: A dull grey mushroom. Looks boring but it's not.

green_mushroom.name: Green Mushroom
green_mushroom.description: A vibrant green mushroom. Slightly luminous.

orange_mushroom.name: Orange Mushroom
orange_mushroom.description: An orange mushroom. Warm to the touch.

antidote.name: Antidote
antidote.description: A bitter herbal remedy. Cures poison and stops bleeding.

salve.name: Salve
salve.description: A cool ointment. Soothes burns and clears the head.

panacea.name: Panacea
panacea.description: A rare elixir that cures all afflictions.
